tweets.topic: India surpasses one billion broadband subscribers in November 2025: TRAI
tweets.tweet: India crossed one billion broadband subscribers in November 2025, according to TRAI data released today. Finally we're connecting the entire nation, but half the country still complains about buffering during prime time. #IndianTelecom #BroadbandGrowth

tweets.topic: How safe are you from fraud during Amazon and Flipkart's Republic Day sales, and can cyber insurance...
tweets.tweet: Amazon and Flipkart's Republic Day sales attract fraudsters like moths to flame, with cyber insurance policies covering only ₹1-5 lakh in losses. Your ₹50,000 shopping spree could leave you uninsured if scammers strike during checkout chaos. #CyberSecurity #IndianEcommerce

tweets.topic: Smartphones launching in India next week: Vivo T5 Pro, OPPO F33 series, and more
tweets.tweet: Vivo T5 Pro, OPPO F33 series, and several other smartphones launch in India next week with competitive specs and pricing. So many phones dropping simultaneously — your decision paralysis just got a premium upgrade. #IndianTech #SmartphoneLaunch

tweets.topic: Internet subscribers in India grew 1.1% in October-December 2025 quarter: TRAI
tweets.tweet: Internet subscribers in India grew 1.1% in October-December 2025 quarter according to TRAI data. Slow growth means most Indians already have internet access — now the real challenge is making it affordable enough for everyone to actually use it. #IndianTelecom #TRAI

tweets.topic: How to Find Legit Crypto Support in India 2026
tweets.tweet: Crypto support services in India are becoming regulated with new RBI guidelines in 2026 for legitimate exchanges. Stop falling for scam helplines — only use verified SEBI-registered platforms before your Bitcoin vanishes into thin air. #CryptoIndia #DigitalSafety

tweets.topic: Redmi A7 Pro 5G Launched in India: Price, Specs and Sale Date Revealed
tweets.tweet: Xiaomi launched the Redmi A7 Pro 5G in India with competitive pricing and impressive specs including a large display. Budget phone buyers finally get 5G without selling a kidney, though battery life remains the eternal question. #Redmi #5GTech

tweets.topic: Beware of Online Scams During Flipkart Big Billion Days, Amazon Great Indian Festival & Other Festive Sales
tweets.tweet: Flipkart Big Billion Days and Amazon Great Indian Festival attract scammers who exploit festive shopping with fake discounts and phishing links targeting unsuspecting buyers.

tweets.topic: India challenges Jio, Airtel over dropping entry-level plans
tweets.tweet: India's telecom regulator is pressuring Jio and Airtel to keep affordable entry-level plans in their portfolio. Looks like the government finally realized that not everyone can afford ₹499 monthly plans — competition matters when you're serving a billion people.

tweets.topic: Redmi A7 Pro 5G with 120Hz display and 6300 mAh battery launched in India, price starts at ₹12,499
tweets.tweet: Redmi A7 Pro 5G launched in India starting at ₹12,499 with a 120Hz display and 6300mAh battery. Finally, budget phones that actually last a day and don't feel like ancient tech in your hand. #Redmi #BudgetTech
